scripts.test:fork: dotenv -c -- bash -c 'test -n "${BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL:-$NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL}" || (echo "BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL not set" && exit 1); BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL="${BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL:-$NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL}" forge test --match-path "test/fork/**" -vvv'
scripts.deploy:local: dotenv -c -- forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast && pnpm run generate-abis
scripts.deploy:sepolia: dotenv -c -- forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url base-sepolia --broadcast --slow --verify && pnpm run generate-abis
scripts.account: echo 'pnpm account is not used — set WARM_DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY in .env instead'
scripts.account:generate: echo 'pnpm account:generate is not used — set WARM_DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY in .env instead'
scripts.account:import: echo 'pnpm account:import is not used — set WARM_DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY in .env instead'
scripts.account:reveal-pk: echo 'pnpm account:reveal-pk is not used — WARM_DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY is in .env'
